name: HYDROFARM HOLDINGS GROUP, INC.
business: Hydrofarm is a leading independent manufacturer and distributor of branded hydroponics equipment and supplies for controlled environment agriculture (CEA), including grow lights, climate control solutions, grow media and nutrients. It primarily serves the U.S. and Canadian markets through over 1,800 wholesale customer accounts. Its products are used to grow cannabis, flowers, fruits, vegetables, grains, and herbs.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading independent manufacturer and distributor of branded hydroponics equipment and supplies for controlled environment agriculture ("CEA"), including grow lights, climate control solutions, grow media and nutrients, as well as a broad portfolio of innovative and proprietary branded products.

Today, we believe that a majority of the CEA equipment and supplies we sell to our customers is ultimately purchased by participants in the cannabis industry, though we do not sell directly to cannabis growers in the United States.
Our products are distributed across the United States and Canada through a diversified range of retailers of commercial and home gardening equipment and supplies.

catalysts.event: Exclusive distribution agreement with Quality Horticulture in Canada
catalysts.sentence: On February 18, 2026, we entered into definitive agreement with Quality Horticulture, a family-owned Canadian garden center and horticultural distribution company, pursuant to which Quality Horticulture will serve as the exclusive Canadian distributor of our proprietary portfolio of nutrients, plant additives, grow media, horticultural lighting and environmental control products, including House & Garden, Grotek, Gaia Green, PHOTOBIO, SunBlaster, Active Aqua and Aurora Peat Products.

catalysts.event: Deferred interest payment on Term Loan
catalysts.sentence: On February 4, 2026, we elected to defer making the interest payment of approximately $2.8 million on the Term Loan.

catalysts.event: Event of default notification on Term Loan
catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2026, the lenders, through the administrative agent, notified us of such event of default and informed us that the administrative agent or the collateral agent may exercise any rights and remedies provided under the Credit and Guaranty Agreement and related financing documents, but it did not seek to enforce such remedies as of such time.
On February 10, 2026, JPMorgan issued a notice to the Company and Lenders of its resignation as Administrative Agent and Collateral Agent under the Credit and Guaranty Agreement.

On February 17, 2026, we entered into an agreement (the "Termination Agreement") to terminate that certain Credit Agreement, dated as of March 29, 2021, as amended, by among JPMorgan, as administrative agent, issuing bank and swingline lender, the other loan parties from time to time party thereto and the lenders from time to time party thereto (the "Revolving Credit Agreement").
The 2025 Restructuring Plan is expected be completed by the end of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: According to industry publications, the global CEA industry was estimated at approximately $96 billion in 2024, and is expected to grow to approximately $507 billion by 2034 representing a CAGR of 18%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to industry publications, the global CEA industry was estimated at approximately $96 billion in 2024, and is expected to grow to approximately $507 billion by 2034 representing a CAGR of 18%.
